column1: # trade_visibility_manifest.tsv — EVERY trade-producing book, producer -> desk (S-2026-07-12 never-again audit, class A).
# WHY: the chimera/josgp1 system produced shadow trades for WEEKS with no pipeline to the
# operator's desk (closes died in journalctl; SUI-TSMOM-H4 +12.79bp on 11-07 never left the
# box). scripts/mimic_pnl_completeness_gate.sh covers endpoint<->fold; NOTHING covered
# producer<->endpoint — a book with NO endpoint at all was invisible. This manifest is the
# closed-world record of every producer; scripts/trade_visibility_gate.sh (wired into the
#   * Every NEW trade-producing book (engine family, companion, ladder, python/C++ book,
#     any writer of closed trades) MUST get a row here IN THE SAME COMMIT that ships it.
#       WIRED          producer -> transport -> endpoint -> panel -> fold all live   (pass)
#       WIRED-DISPLAY  reaches the desk display by design but does NOT fold ALL-TIME (pass)
#       RETIRED-ok     book retired/disabled; produces nothing or $0 history          (pass)
#       RESEARCH-ONLY  isolated research/ablation book, no desk claim BY DESIGN       (pass)
#       FIX-IN-FLIGHT  known gap, fix owned/in progress — LOUD WARN every canary run  (warn)
#       STRANDED       produces money/trades the desk cannot see                      (FAIL)
#   * chimera rows: FIX-IN-FLIGHT until the chimera->desk pipeline agent lands
#     (export_desk_trade in josgp1 main.cpp S-2026-07-12 + Mac relay), then flip the one
#   * Producer paths on other boxes are prefixed josgp1: (existence not checkable Mac-side).
# columns: book <TAB> system <TAB> producer <TAB> transport <TAB> endpoint <TAB> panel <TAB> fold <TAB> status <TAB> note
